page.title: Advanced Reported Speech
page.subtitle_html: Advanced Reported Speech — B2 reported speech with backshift, reported questions, commands, requests and reporting verbs.
page.subtitle_text: B2 reported speech with backshift, reported questions, commands, requests and reporting verbs.

blocks.body: {"level":"B2","intro":"Advanced Reported Speech: Advanced Reported Speech поєднує statements, questions, commands, requests, backshift and time/place changes у B2-level reporting.","rules":[{"label":"Backshift","text":"After past reporting verbs, tense often moves one step back.","example":"She said that she had finished."},{"label":"Questions","text":"Reported questions use statement word order after if / whether or wh-words.","example":"He asked where I lived."},{"label":"Commands and requests","text":"Use told / asked + object + to-infinitive or not to-infinitive.","example":"They told us not to wait."}]}

blocks.heading: B2 focus
blocks.body: This compact page exists as the theory anchor for the Polyglot English B2 lesson package.
